headlines.title: People smuggler convicted in France found by BBC living in UK and seeking asylum
headlines.description: Once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in a Leicestershire village.

headlines.title: Watch: People smuggler tracked down and confronted by BBC
headlines.description: A convicted people smuggler is living in Leicestershire and seeking asylum while working illegally, the BBC can reveal.

headlines.title: At least 18 killed in 'most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv
headlines.description: Kyiv's mayor declares a day of mourning after the 'most massive attack on the capital' by Russia.

headlines.title: Victims of forced adoption to get formal apology after years campaigning
headlines.description: The practice saw thousands of babies taken from their mothers between 1949 and 1976.

headlines.title: Don't expect inbuilt trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
headlines.description: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.

headlines.title: Third UK heatwave increasingly likely as 30C temperatures forecast
headlines.description: Temperatures are forecast to climb throughout the weekend, potentially leading to a heatwave being declared in parts of the UK

headlines.title: Race Across the World winner's car smashed into and laptop stolen before kids' mental health talk
headlines.description: Alfie Watts describes "enormous frustration" after the theft the night before a Welsh schools tour.

headlines.title: The US deported them to Venezuela - hours later earthquakes struck
headlines.description: They landed on Flight 164 just before the twin quakes. Family members are desperately searching for them.

headlines.title: 'I spent $6,000 on a World Cup trip but was left stranded at the gate'
headlines.description: Hundreds of fans who bought World Cup tickets on resale site StubHub say they have had them cancelled at the last minute.

headlines.title: Turkish police beat us with iron rods before we lost limbs to frostbite, Afghans say
headlines.description: The young migrants heading to Europe say they were stripped and had their hands tied in freezing temperatures.

headlines.title: Highland masterpiece by Queen Victoria's favourite artist sells for £5.9m
headlines.description: Scene in Braemar, by Queen Victoria's favourite artist Sir Edwin Landseer, fetched five times the previous record for one of his works.

headlines.title: Tuchel urges parents to let kids stay up for England game
headlines.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel urges parents to let their children stay up to watch England take on Mexico in the last 16 of the World Cup.

headlines.title: 'You can't catch your breath' - how will Azteca altitude impact England?
headlines.description: BBC Sport explores how playing football at high altitude affects the body and mind as England prepare to visit Mexico and their fortress Azteca Stadium.

headlines.title: USA march on but will Balogun red card prove costly?
headlines.description: Mauricio Pochettino's USA side set up a World Cup last-16 meeting with Belgium, but how costly will forward Folarin Balogun's red card prove?

headlines.title: Latest ever winner, comeback and controversy - Senegal's remarkable exit
headlines.description: Late drama, controversy, history and heartbreak - the World Cup last-32 tie between Belgium and Senegal had everything.

headlines.title: From friendship bracelets to wedding rings: A Taylor and Travis timeline
headlines.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are expected to celebrate their wedding with a party at New York's Madison Square Garden this weekend.

headlines.title: Americans are celebrating their split from Britain - how is the UK marking it?
headlines.description: As the United States turns 250 years old, people across the pond are running events of their own to mark the big breakup.

headlines.title: Madonna's Confessions II is finally here - but is it worth the 21-year wait?
headlines.description: The pop star's 15th album starts on the dancefloor, but ends with deep personal revelations.

headlines.title: From Truman's pension to Trump's billions - a White House windfall unmatched by any president
headlines.description: Historians say Trump's $2.2bn income last year is unprecedented and blurs the line on conflicts of interest.

headlines.title: Diesel sees biggest monthly fall in 26 years. What's happening to fuel prices?
headlines.description: When the US-Israel war with Iran began, fuel costs jumped, but they are now plummeting as hope of lasting peace grows.

headlines.title: Did this AI anti-drug video make drugs look appealing?
headlines.description: Hong Kong’s Correctional Services Department removed an AI-generated K-pop video, after facing backlash that it made substances look too appealing.

headlines.title: EU border delays 'not bearable' over summer, warns airport boss
headlines.description: Holidaymakers face long waits under the EU's new Entry-Exit System, the head of Berlin's airport says.

headlines.title: Police officer who raped two women and abused a third jailed for 10 years
headlines.description: Cameron Ross carried out attacks in Stornoway in 2012 and 2014, before abusing another woman in Inverness between 2019 and 2022.

headlines.title: China says pilot crashed small plane into skyscraper for 'personal reasons'
headlines.description: The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary.

headlines.title: Government 'looking at every route' to deport grooming leader
headlines.description: Shabir Ahmed is barred from deportation by the provisions in a 55-year-old piece of legislation.

headlines.title: Jockey Frankie Dettori breaks ribs in car crash
headlines.description: The racing jockey is in hospital recovering from the crash.

headlines.title: Watch: Couple scale Empire State Building, get engaged and are arrested
headlines.description: The two were atop the 1,454 ft (443m) building for at least ten minutes and displayed a large banner before climbing down.

headlines.title: Attempted murder arrest over shooting of boy, 16
headlines.description: A 17-year-old is in custody as a boy, 16, remains in a critical condition in hospital, say police.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: What Does It Cost To Keep The UK Safe?

headlines.description: BBC Sport explores how playing football at high altitude affects the body and mind as England prepare to visit Mexico and their fortress Azteca Stadium.

headlines.title: Norris 'happy I have the pain of this year for the glory of last'
headlines.description: Lando Norris tells BBC Sport he is "paying the price" for the effort that brought him the 2025 title - and why McLaren would be a "different vibe" for Max Verstappen.
